info.title: Data Use Governance - Data Discovery
info.description: The Data Discovery API provides comprehensive REST endpoints for managing data discovery operations including data sources, scan profiles, credentials, and scan jobs with OAuth2 security and extensive filtering capabilities.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Classification
tags.description: The Classification APIs are used to manage custom data classifiers and classification rules for Data Discovery.

tags.name: Credentials
tags.description: APIs to manage credential operations including creation, updates, deletion, retrieval, and secure reference key management for multiple system authentication types.

tags.name: Data Sources
tags.description: APIs to manage data sources including creation, retrieval, updates, deletion, and comprehensive filtering with support for multiple system types and asset integration.

tags.name: Installer
tags.description: APIs to retrieve Docker image tags and installation resources for worker node deployment and version management across different environments.

tags.name: Scan Jobs
tags.description: APIs to control scan job execution including creation, cancellation, status monitoring, and comprehensive job history retrieval with filtering and pagination support.

tags.name: Scan Profiles
tags.description: APIs to handle scan profile lifecycle management including creation, updates, deletion, and retrieval with support for catalog and catalog-scan types across various system platforms.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve a list of all credentials. The response will include details such as the credential name, ID, and reference key.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The parameter to search for a credential by name.

parameters.name: systemName
parameters.description: The parameter to search for a credential by systemName.

schema.description: The parameter to search for a credential by systemName.

parameters.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N).

schema.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Maximum page size allowed is 50

schema.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Maximum page size allowed is 50

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property(,asc|desc). Default is ascending.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve a list of all scan jobs in JSON format for the specified data source. The response will include relevant details for each scan job, including the corresponding scan job ID, created date, and cancelled date.

parameters.name: dataSourceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the data source.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the job scan

parameters.name: scanLevel
parameters.description: Array of scan levels

parameters.name: isManual
parameters.description: The flag to check if the retrieved jobs are Manual or Scheduled

parameters.name: createdFrom
parameters.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) to filter the scan jobs created on or after the specified date. For example, including the parameter createdFrom=2022-06-06 will filter results to scan jobs on or after June 6th, 2022.

parameters.name: createdTo
parameters.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) to filter the scan jobs created on or before the specified date. For example, including the parameter createdTo=2022-06-06 would filter results to scan jobs on or before June 6th, 2022.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N).

schema.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Maximum page size allowed is 50

schema.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Maximum page size allowed is 50

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property(,asc|desc). Default is ascending.

schema.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property(,asc|desc). Default is ascending.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve details of a specific scan job by its unique identifier. Returns comprehensive job information including status, progress, timestamps, metadata counts, scan profile used, and ingestion status.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Unique identifier (UUID) of the scan job. Obtain from Create Scan Job API or Get List of Scan Jobs API. Must be a valid UUID format.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

patch.description: Use this API to cancel an existing scan job by its unique identifier. The job must be in a cancellable state (PENDING, PROCESSING, PAUSING). Jobs that are already COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED, or CANCELLING cannot be cancelled. The cancellation is asynchronous - the job status will change to CANCELLING immediately, then to CANCELLED once the worker node acknowledges the cancellation.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Unique identifier (UUID) of the scan job to cancel. Obtain from Create Scan Job API or Get List of Scan Jobs API. Must be a valid UUID format.

202.description: Scan job cancellation accepted and initiated

get.description: Use this API to retrieve a list of all scan profiles. The response will include details for each scan profile along with the corresponding scan profile ID and its associated scan type, system, and paths.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: The parameter to search for a scan profile by name.

parameters.name: systemName
parameters.description: A system name. Include to filter results to be limited to scan profiles with this system. Some examples are "Box", "Snowflake", and "MongoDB".

parameters.name: scanType
parameters.description: It is the scan profile type.

parameters.name: createdFrom
parameters.description: Include a date (yyyy-mm-dd) to filter the results to scan profiles created on or after the specified date. For example, including the parameter createdFrom=2021-08-17 will filter results to scan profiles on or after August 17th, 2021.

parameters.name: createdTo
parameters.description: Include a date (yyyy-mm-dd) to filter the results to scan profiles created on or before the specified date. For example, including the parameter createdTo=2021-08-17 would filter results to scan profiles on or before August 17th, 2021.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N).

schema.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Maximum page size allowed is 50

schema.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Maximum page size allowed is 50

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property(,asc|desc). Default is ascending.

schema.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property(,asc|desc). Default is ascending.

get.description:
Use this API to retrieve a list of all Docker images for a specific worker node version.

> 🗒 Things to Know
>
> - The list of Docker images will be returned in the following format: [REPOSITORY[ : TAG]], where tag stands for version number.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Version of the worker node.

200.description: List of installer docker image tag names

cronExpression.description: Cron expression to define the schedule in standard cron format.
cronExpression.example: 0 0/5 buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils ?

dateTime.description: Specific date and time configuration for scheduling.

isRunManual.description: Flag to indicate whether the trigger should run manually.

orgGroupId.description: Org Group ID for Data Source

example.cronExpression: 0 0 buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils ? buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils *

seconds.description: Seconds field for the cron expression.

minutes.description: Minutes field for the cron expression.

hours.description: Hours field for the cron expression.

dayOfMonth.description: Day of month field for the cron expression.

month.description: Month field for the cron expression.

dayOfWeek.description: Day of week field for the cron expression.

year.description: Year field for the cron expression.

label.description: Label for the field, typically used for display purposes.

value.description: Value representing the selected option for this field.

cronExp.description: The cron expression fragment for this field.
cronExp.example: 0 0/5 buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils buildMR_Jenkinsfile getApiSpec.sh specVariationChecker_Jenkinsfile tryCatch.sh utils ?

scanProfileContext.description: Properties of Scan Profile Specific to System

displayName.description: Display Name for System Name of Scan Profile

scanProfileContext.description: Properties of Scan Profile Specific to System

displayName.description: Display Name for System Name of Scan Profile

dataSourceId.description: Unique identifier of the data source to scan. This data source must exist and be active.

scanProfileId.description: Optional scan profile ID to use for this scan job. If provided, must match the data source system type. If not provided, the data source's default scan profile will be used.

classificationProfileId.description: Classification profile ID for the scan job. Used when classification v2 is disabled. Either this or detectorProfileId should be provided for classification scans.

detectorProfileId.description: Detector profile ID for the scan job. Used when classification v2 is enabled. Either this or classificationProfileId should be provided for classification scans.

sourceSystemId.description: Source System ID for Scan job

updatedBy.description: user who last updated scan job

ingestedMetadataVolume.description: Scan job ingestion metadata volume in bytes

totalContentSize.description: Scan Job total content size in bytes

retryAttempts.description: Total Retry Attempts for scan job failures

maxRetries.description: Max Retries allowed for scan job failures

idleScanDuration.description: Idle time of scan when Paused (or) during retry

size.description: The size of the page (number of elements per page).

numberOfElements.description: The number of elements on the current page.

totalElements.description: The total number of elements across all pages.

first.description: Indicates if this is the first page.

last.description: Indicates if this is the last page.

empty.description: Indicates if the page is empty.

size.description: The size of the page (number of elements per page).

numberOfElements.description: The number of elements on the current page.

totalElements.description: The total number of elements across all pages.

first.description: Indicates if this is the first page.

last.description: Indicates if this is the last page.

empty.description: Indicates if the page is empty.

windowBefore.description: The maximum number of characters to include for context before the match.

windowAfter.description: The maximum number of characters to include for context after the match.

isPII.description: This flag indicates whether the classifier contains personally identifiable information.

definition.description: The technical definition of the classifier.

detectionRules.name: Boost Likelihood for IDs Do Not Start with 123 (Example of Using Inverse)
Append 4 Digit Extension If Found (Example of Using includeExpand)

glossaryTerm.description: The glossary term associated with the classifier.

detectorVersion.description: The version number of the detector used by the classifier.

id.description: The unique identifier of the classifier.

code.description: The system-generated code of the classifier.

custom.description: This flag indicates whether the classifier is custom-created.

enabled.description: This flag indicates whether the classifier is active.

surrogateType.description: The surrogate type associated with the classifier.

detectorType.description: The type of detector used by the classifier to classify data.

isGlossaryTermChanged.description: This flag indicates whether the glossary term association has changed.

lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time when the classifier was last modified.

createdDate.description: The date and time when the classifier was created.

createdBy.description: The unique identifier of the user that created the classifier.

lastModifiedBy.description: The unique identifier of the user that last modified the classifier.

version.description: The version number used for optimistic locking.

type.description: The type of detection rule applied to validate matches.

name.description: The name of the detection rule used for validation.
name.example: Check If The Finding Starts With 123

dictionary.description: The dictionary configuration used in the detection rule.

pattern.description: The pattern configuration used in the detection rule.

validator.description: The validator configuration used in the detection rule.

inverse.description: This flag indicates whether to return matches that meet or do not meet the detection rule criteria.

target.description: The target option where the detection rule is applied.

context.description: The context configuration for the detection rule.

likelihoodAdjustment.description: The likelihood adjustment configuration applied when detection rule criteria are met.

includeExpand.description: This flag indicates whether to include context that matches or does not match the detection rule criteria.

name.description: The name of the classifier definition.

otCode.description: The OneTrust code assigned to the classifier definition.

isCustom.description: This flag indicates whether the classifier definition is custom-created.

VERSION.description: The version number of the classifier definition.

SCHEMA_VERSION.description: The schema version used for the classifier definition.

metadata.description: The metadata information associated with the classifier definition.

example.description: This Classifier represents someone's political affiliation based on political parties and ideologies.

detections.description: The list of detectors used to establish the best matching criteria.

detectionRules.description: The list of detection rules used to validate and adjust the likelihood result.

evaluations.description: The list of evaluation test cases used to validate the classifier.

displayName.description: The display name used for the classifier in user interfaces.

otDisplayName.description: The OneTrust display name used for the classifier.

description.description: The description of the classifier metadata.
description.example: Detects credit card numbers in text using pattern matching.

locations.description: The list of geographic locations where the classifier applies.

items.description: List of geographical locations relevant for the detector.

languages.description: The list of languages supported by the classifier.

terms.description: The list of terms or keywords used in the detection rule dictionary.

ignoreCase.description: This flag indicates whether the detection rule dictionary ignores case sensitivity.

text.description: The sample text used for evaluation testing.

match.description: The list of expected matches for the evaluation test case.

metadata.description: The metadata information associated with the evaluation test case.

ignoreCase.description: This flag indicates whether word filtering ignores case sensitivity.

inverse.description: This flag indicates whether to apply inverse word filtering logic.

startBoundary.description: The boundary condition applied at the start of word filtering.

endBoundary.description: The boundary condition applied at the end of word filtering.

name.description: The name of the glossary term associated with the classifier.

id.description: The unique identifier of the glossary term associated with the classifier.

adjustLikelihood.description: The integer value used to adjust the likelihood level based on the current likelihood when detection rule criteria are met.

setLikelihood.description: The target likelihood level that is set when detection rule criteria are met regardless of the current level.

type.description: The strategy used to adjust the likelihood level when detection rule criteria are met.

XPATH.description: The XPath expression used in the evaluation metadata.

xpath.description: The XPath expression used in the evaluation metadata.

type.description: The type of detector used for pattern matching.

pattern.description: The pattern configuration used for detection matching.

dictionary.description: The dictionary configuration used for detection matching.

surrogate.description: The surrogate configuration used when using a template from an existing detector.

likelihood.description: The initial likelihood level assigned to the detector.

description.description: The description of the detector used for pattern matching.

prerequisite.description: The prerequisite conditions that must be met before applying the detector.

requirements.description: The list of requirements that must be satisfied for the detector.

wordFilter.description: The list of words used to filter detection results.

wordFilterFlags.description: The flags that control how word filtering is applied.

regex.description: The regular expression pattern used in the detection rule.

flags.description: The flags that control the regex pattern matching logic in the detection rule.

type.description: The type of validator used in the detection rule.

options.description: The configuration options for the validator used in the detection rule.

code.description: The system-generated code of the classifier.
